entry.title: New: CR 24-71 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 17 (2022), to amend Chapter 19.29, Maui County Code, to prohibit instruments of conveyance restricting small-scale agricultural uses and the keeping of animals in any County rural zoning district.

Agriculture, Diversification, Environment, and Public Transportation Committee

View on the council site
